known_safe_categories: node_modules/* — third-party library detection patterns + .tsbuildinfo hash files (vast majority of findings)

scripts/.service-account.json — gitignored, never committed to git history (verified: git log --all -- scripts/.service-account.json returns empty; git ls-files | grep service-account returns nothing)
src/core/firebase.js:52 apiKey — public Firebase config key, per CLAUDE.md Security Notes: 'Firebase keys are restricted by Firestore rules, not secrecy'
.claude/state/wave-zero-dry-run/*.json — SHA-256 content hashes from dashboard regen, not secrets
.claude/hooks/secrets-scanner.sh:L49 — regex pattern that itself contains 'BEGIN PRIVATE KEY' literal for matching
